features.description: Fix invalid CSS selectors in test files. Replace select:has-option() with proper selectOption() calls using label/value/index selectors.
expectedBehavior: select:has-option() replaced with proper selectOption({ label: 'text' }) calls
verificationSteps: Tests with selectors pass without syntax errors

features.description: Fix table visibility waits in tests. Change state: 'visible' to state: 'attached' for tables to not timeout on empty data. Also ensure tables have data by having the app auto-seed minimal data on first run.
expectedBehavior: Empty tables are detected and handled gracefully
Tests wait for data OR accept 'no data' state
verificationSteps: grep for 'state: .visible' in table waits - should find none

features.description: Fix Export/Import button visibility. Ensure buttons are visible after login. The buttons are hidden behind !isGuest condition - ensure login state persists and isGuest is false.
expectedBehavior: Export Excel button visible after login
Import Excel button visible after login
verificationSteps: Navigate to Master Data COA page
Export and Import buttons are visible

features.description: Fix VAL-USER-051 invalid login error test. Increase wait time for error message to render and fix the assertion logic.
expectedBehavior: Invalid login shows error message within 3 seconds

features.description: Fix VAL-MASTER-PERF-001 performance test. Uses same table wait as VAL-MASTER-COAS-001, should be fixed with table wait strategy fix.
